{{Item
| image = Doggy contacts.png
| id = doggy_contacts
| type = Customization
| Subtype = Double Dyeable
| stackable = 64
| Description = Craft with Paper to Dye the other len.
}}

'''Doggy Contact Lenses''' is a double-dyeable equipable item that customizes your dog's eye colors.
[[File:Doggy contacts display2.png|thumb|205x205px|Double-Dyeable!]]
[[File:Doggy contacts display.png|592x592px|2023-08-01_18 51 47]]
==Obtaining==
===Crafting===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
!Ingredients
!Recipe
|-
|Glass Pane
+ [[Bottle of Sake]]
|[[File:Doggy contacts crafting.png]]
|}
==Usage==
{{Accessory_use}}
==Trivia==
*It was introduced to DTN 1.18.5.
*It was suggested by a Discord user - @pipthewolfy.
